mapper.select: SELECT i.inq_no, i.member_no, i.title, i.content, i.inq_status, i.reply_content, i.reply_dt, i.reply_by, i.created_at, i.updated_at, m.email AS member_email, m.member_nm, c.code_nm AS inq_status_nm FROM inquiry i LEFT JOIN member m ON i.member_no = m.member_no LEFT JOIN com_code c ON c.grp_cd = 'INQ_STATUS' AND c.code = i.inq_status WHERE i.inq_no = #{inqNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inquiry (member_no, title, content, inq_status) VALUES (#{memberNo}, #{title}, #{content}, 'WAIT')
mapper.update: UPDATE inquiry SET reply_content = #{replyContent}, reply_dt = NOW(), reply_by = #{replyBy}, inq_status = 'DONE', updated_at = NOW() WHERE inq_no = #{inqNo}
